\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4141 introduces Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\\\lambda_i(t) = \\\\lambda_0 \\\\sum_n J_n(\\\\kappa)^2 S_{i,n}(t) [1+\\\\beta R_i(t)].$$
